description_long: This is a tall, cylindrical can with a matte black exterior, featuring the 'Espresso Monster' branding in ornate gold and white lettering on the front. The can displays a large, stylized 'M' logo in gold, with a small cup of espresso illustrated below, suggesting a coffee-based beverage. Decorative flourishes and the words 'Vanilla Espresso' are visible, enhancing the premium and energetic appeal. The top of the can is metallic with a pull-tab opening, and a blue accent ring encircles the rim. The back of the can contains a detailed nutritional information panel in white text. The overall design is sleek and modern, with a focus on bold branding and clear flavor indication.
description: A tall, matte black can with gold and white 'Espresso Monster' branding, featuring a large gold 'M' logo, espresso cup graphic, and detailed nutritional panel on the back.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'Espresso Monster' branding, gold 'M' logo, and espresso cup graphic.
description_view_1: Angled side view with partial branding visible and the metallic pull-tab top in clear view.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the white nutritional information panel against the black background.
description_view_3: Angled side view with partial branding and decorative elements visible, similar to view 1 but from the opposite side.
attribute_brand_logo: A large, stylized gold 'M' logo with claw marks, located on the front center of the can, accompanied by 'Espresso Monster' text in ornate gold and white above it.
attribute_flavor_indication: The words 'Vanilla Espresso' and an image of a cup of espresso are visible on the front, indicating a vanilla espresso flavor.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: A detailed nutritional information panel is visible on the back of the can, listing ingredients and nutrition facts.
